feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Spark O' Mine
entry.summary:
Author: tadreen1

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,799Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Stiles's heart flutters nervously in his chest. His entire body, submerged in the bath, burns from the icy water, his teeth clicking against each other with every breath. But on either side of him are Scott and Allison, and it's not like they're currently spiraling into a panic attack. But Scott has an advantage, his werewolf tricks must have given him some extra tolerance to extreme temperatures. And Allison- she's a hunter with an impenetrable, confident face. He looks at Deaton again. Sure, the mysterious veterinarian knows what he's doing. Yeah, he said it was dangerous, but who is Stiles to drown in a bathtub with some herbs that look like parsley? Or in which Nemeton gives Stiles the Spark and now he has to deal with it. And that's not the only problem. NOT COMPLETED!!!

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,547Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 33

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,579Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 288

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: Caretaker
entry.summary:
Author: ProphetofJuly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,365Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: In the backseat of the car, with Stiles’ head in his lap there is nothing Derek can do but worry, peeling the scabs off his old pains and fears, digging his claws into the parts that have healed over and kicking himself for getting complacent. The people he loves still get hurt, and it’s still his fault, because he was born a werewolf and because he’s not very good at it and because he was never meant to be an alpha and anyone besides Derek would have done a better job and kept Stiles safe. If only he had done everything differently, if only he had kept hunters out of his territory, if only he had never let himself love Stiles in the first place to put him in the position to be harmed. If only. -- The events of Take Care, from Derek's POV

entry.title: i've been sleeping alone
entry.summary:
Author: morvish

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,025Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: They had been sat in the doorway to Scott’s back garden at New Year when Derek had told Stiles about his decision to give up being Alpha, Stiles had literally whooped with joy. Derek had made a joke about Stiles being too happy about not having Derek as his Alpha anymore, and Stiles had been so giddy with pride that he didn’t even joke back. He just gave him the longest hug and Derek had hugged him back so tightly. Stiles would deny any tears that may have been present as he luxuriated in the warm, glowing fondness and intimacy of the moment. Derek’s hands had felt so warm and safe and certain as they moved down Stiles’ back. But now, in the yellow light of the ranger cabin, all these months later, Stiles wanted to reach out to Derek, touch his shoulder, or even just bump his knee with his own but he couldn’t make himself do it. It felt wrong. “We’ll find them,” he said instead. “We will.”

entry.title: Works Like a Charm
entry.summary:
Author: AShortWalkToDelinquency

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,173Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: It takes a day or two to take hold, for the charm's magic to leak out all over Jackson the way Stiles intended. And even when it does, there's really no difference at first. Life goes on. Jackson is kind of a jerk to everyone. If Stiles didn't know better, he'd think it wasn't working at all.But Stiles does know better.And he has faith in his magic, in his Spark.

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,961Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 17

entry.title: The Wrong Man in First Class
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,928Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Slutty flight attendant Stiles spots hot, Rolex-wearing Derek in first class and assumes rich jackpot. She turns full whore: short skirt hikes, tits in his face, turbulence dry-hump orgasm, begs raw cock in hotel. Sweet office worker Derek (sent instead of CEO) gets wrecked, falls hard for her greedy pussy. Truth hits: he’s just a salaryman. Stiles tries to bolt—“No money, no me.” Derek snaps—rips her dress, pins her down, fucks her raw and rough: slaps her ass red, chokes her, breeds her deep while growling, “You chased cash, but this ‘poor’ cock owns your cunt now.” She breaks—cums screaming, begs to stay. No more rich fantasies. Just his thick dick owning her forever.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,860Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: A Beautiful Wreckage
entry.summary:
Author: sensingowls

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,224Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 43

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back to Beacon Hills in years, but when he senses Something is Up, he makes the decision to go back to help out. Filled with anxiety, he heads back to the trauma filled nightmare that is his hometown, ready to protect his pack, the love of his life and his son.This fic takes huge liberties with the plot of the movie, featuring Sterek who are idiots in love, a magical, BAMF Stiles, and a demon masquerading as the Nogitsune.

entry.title: Beacon of Gotham
entry.summary:
Author: IndridxCold

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,923Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Stiles leaves Beacon Hills with one mind: LEAVE BEHIND ALL THE WEREWOLF DRAMA and especially his beloved Derek Hale. Unfortunately, the universe has a pretty funny sense of humor, because he ends up in Gotham City, home to masked lunatics, crime-ridden alleys, and a caped crusader that reigns the night. Stiles keeps telling himself, he's passing through... except Gotham has a way of pulling people in. Between getting tangled up with the brooding Dark Knight to crossing paths with the mysterious but also dashing billionaire playboy, Bruce Wayne, Stiles somehow finds himself right in the middle of something bigger than Gotham's usual chaos. Because while everyone's busy watching the streets, something else is moving in the shadows and connecting people who should have nothing to do with each other... especially Stiles.

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 1,346

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.
